# FHIR Queries: Hepatitis C Patient Population Identification

---

## Query 1 — HCV Diagnoses (Condition)

### 1a. ICD-10-CM Coded Diagnoses
```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B17.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B17.11,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B18.2,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B19.20,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|B19.21&verification-status=confirmed&_include=Condition:subject
```

### 1b. SNOMED CT Coded Diagnoses
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|50711007,http://snomed.info/sct|111880001,http://snomed.info/sct|128302006&verification-status=confirmed&_include=Condition:subject
```

**Code Reference — HCV Diagnoses:**

| Code System | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|
| ICD-10-CM | `B17.10` | Acute hepatitis C without hepatic coma |
| ICD-10-CM | `B17.11` | Acute hepatitis C with hepatic coma |
| ICD-10-CM | `B18.2` | Chronic viral hepatitis C |
| ICD-10-CM | `B19.20` | Unspecified viral hepatitis C without hepatic coma |
| ICD-10-CM | `B19.21` | Unspecified viral hepatitis C with hepatic coma |
| SNOMED CT | `50711007` | Hepatitis C (disorder) — parent concept |
| SNOMED CT | `111880001` | Acute viral hepatitis C (disorder) |
| SNOMED CT | `128302006` | Chronic viral hepatitis C (disorder) |

> **Note:** `clinical-status` is intentionally omitted to capture both active disease and historical resolved cases (e.g., post-SVR patients still important in cascade tracking). Remove `verification-status=confirmed` if your EHR encodes unconfirmed/problem-list entries you also want to capture.

---

## Query 2 — Direct-Acting Antiviral Prescriptions (MedicationRequest)

### 2a. By RxNorm Ingredient Code
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1306286,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1546045,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1442983,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|41493&status=active,completed,on-hold,stopped&_include=MedicationRequest:subject&_include=MedicationRequest:medication
```

### 2b. Dispensing Records (MedicationDispense — supplements 2a)
```
MedicationDispense?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1306286,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1546045,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1442983,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|41493&status=completed,in-progress&_include=MedicationDispense:subject
```

**Code Reference — DAA Medications (RxNorm Ingredient Level):**

| RxNorm Code | Drug | Class | Common Brand(s) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `1306286` | Sofosbuvir | NS5B polymerase inhibitor | Sovaldi; also in Harvoni, Epclusa |
| `1546045` | Ledipasvir | NS5A inhibitor | Harvoni (ledipasvir/sofosbuvir) |
| `1442983` | Simeprevir | NS3/4A protease inhibitor | Olysio |
| `41493` | Ribavirin | Nucleoside analogue | Rebetol, Copegus |

> **Important:** RxNorm ingredient codes match the `medicationCodeableConcept` when coded at the ingredient level. If your system stores **product/clinical drug** codes (e.g., Harvoni as a combo product), you may need to additionally query:
> - `1647230` — Ledipasvir 90 MG / Sofosbuvir 400 MG Oral Tablet (Harvoni)
> - `1741793` — Sofosbuvir 400 MG / Velpatasvir 100 MG Oral Tablet (Epclusa)
>
> `MedicationDispense` is included as Query 2b because some EHRs record DAA dispensing without a corresponding `MedicationRequest` in the same system.

---

## Query 3 — HCV Antibody Lab Results (Observation)

### 3a. HCV Antibody (Qualitative & Quantitative) — All Results
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|13955-0,http://loinc.org|16128-1,http://loinc.org|57006-9,http://loinc.org|22327-1,http://loinc.org|40726-2,http://loinc.org|5199-5&_include=Observation:subject
```

### 3b. HCV Antibody — Positive Results Only (refinement filter)
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|13955-0,http://loinc.org|16128-1,http://loinc.org|57006-9,http://loinc.org|22327-1,http://loinc.org|40726-2,http://loinc.org|5199-5&value-concept=http://snomed.info/sct|10828004&_include=Observation:subject
```

**Code Reference — HCV Antibody LOINC Panels:**

| LOINC Code | Display | Method |
|---|---|---|
| `13955-0` | Hepatitis C virus Ab \[Presence\] in Serum | (unspecified) |
| `16128-1` | Hepatitis C virus Ab \[Presence\] in Serum by Immunoassay | EIA/CLIA |
| `57006-9` | Hepatitis C virus Ab \[Presence\] in Serum or Plasma by Immunoassay | EIA |
| `22327-1` | Hepatitis C virus Ab \[Presence\] in Serum or Plasma | (unspecified) |
| `40726-2` | Hepatitis C virus Ab \[Presence\] in Serum by Line blot | Line blot |
| `5199-5` | Hepatitis C virus Ab \[Units/volume\] in Serum | Quantitative |

> **Note:** Query 3a returns **all antibody results regardless of value** (as requested — both positive and indeterminate are clinically significant). Query 3b refines to confirmed positives using SNOMED `10828004` (Positive finding). For the initial population sweep, use 3a.

---

## Bonus Query 4 — HCV RNA Viral Load (Observation)

Captures patients with confirmed active viremia — critical for cascade stage assignment (viremic vs. cleared):

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|11259-9,http://loinc.org|32286-7,http://loinc.org|38180-6,http://loinc.org|49370-9&_include=Observation:subject
```

**Code Reference — HCV RNA LOINC Codes:**

| LOINC Code | Display |
|---|---|
| `11259-9` | Hepatitis C virus RNA \[Presence\] in Serum or Plasma by NAA with probe detection |
| `32286-7` | Hepatitis C virus RNA \[#/volume\] (viral load) in Serum or Plasma by NAA with probe detection |
| `38180-6` | Hepatitis C virus RNA \[log units/volume\] in Serum or Plasma |
| `49370-9` | Hepatitis C virus RNA \[Presence\] in Blood by NAA with probe detection |

---

## Union Logic — Building the Complete Patient List

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              COMPLETE HCV POPULATION (Union of All)                 │
│                                                                     │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌────────┐  │
│  │  Condition   │  │ Medication   │  │  HCV Ab Obs  │  │HCV RNA │  │
│  │  Q1a + Q1b   │  │  Q2a + Q2b  │  │     Q3a      │  │   Q4   │  │
│  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └──────────────┘  └────────┘  │
│                                                                     │
│  Patient ID = resource.subject.reference OR _include Patient.id     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Implementation steps:**
1. Execute all queries; each bundle returns matching resources **plus** referenced `Patient` resources via `_include=...:subject`
2. Extract `Patient.id` from each bundle's `entry[]` where `resource.resourceType == "Patient"`
3. Deduplicate across all bundles using `Patient.id` as the key
4. The resulting unique `Patient.id` set = your complete HCV population

**Cascade staging** using the union population:

| Stage | FHIR Signal |
|---|---|
| Antibody screened | Any result in Q3 |
| Antibody positive | Positive result in Q3b |
| RNA confirmed viremic | Detectable value in Q4 |
| Diagnosed | Record in Q1a / Q1b |
| Treatment initiated | Record in Q2a / Q2b |
| SVR (cured) | `Condition.clinicalStatus = remission/resolved` + undetectable RNA in Q4 |
